company.summary: WestJet is Canada's second-largest airline, headquartered in Calgary (YYC), operating nearly 200 aircraft to 100+ destinations across North America, Europe, Asia, Latin America, and the Caribbean. Following the 2025 integration of Sunwing Airlines, the WestJet Group now includes WestJet Airlines, Sunwing Vacations Group, and WestJet Cargo. The company's stated strategy centres on 'radical digitalization' to improve the guest experience and simplify internal operations.
productsAndTeams: Disruption Management Solutions (Technology Office) — active Product Owner hiring
Digital & Guest Self-Serve (e.g., WestJet app, passport scanning, check-in)
Flight Crew Operational Apps (flight plan delivery, navigation, pilot logs, seat maps, guest manifest)
cultureValues: Safety as a core value ('safety and security of our people and guests is at the heart of what we do')
Low-cost, high-efficiency mindset ('relentless competitiveness and affordability')
Diversity & inclusion ('we welcome diverse skills, experiences, and backgrounds')
Fast-paced, collaborative environment (employees describe work pace as 'extremely fast')
recentNews: Completed full integration of Sunwing Airlines into WestJet operations in 2025
Secured largest-ever aircraft order with Boeing (September 2025, deliveries through 2034)
Signed multi-billion-dollar agreement with Lufthansa Technik for engine maintenance — new Calgary repair facility announced (February 2025)
Expanding globally: new routes to São Paulo (Brazil), Copenhagen, Madrid, Lisbon, Cardiff, Glasgow; Calgary designated as single global connecting hub
Cutting 41 international routes (24 US, 14 Caribbean/Cuba) for 2026–2027 due to declining transborder demand — network pivot toward leisure and sun destinations
Flight volume grew +10.86% YoY in December 2025 despite operational headwinds
techStack: Mobile app development (WestJet iOS/Android app — passport scanning, check-in, guest services)
Back-end web services and REST/GraphQL APIs (referenced in Product Owner JDs)
SQL and query languages (GraphQL, SQL, Cypher listed in PO job requirements)
Agile / Scrum (Scrum certification listed as asset in PO roles)
DevOps / Sr. DevOps roles actively posted in Calgary
hiringSignals: Active Product Owner postings in Calgary: 'Disruption Management Solutions' team (full-time, posted March–April 2026) and 'Flight Crew Operational Apps' team
Intermediate Product Owner (Term ~20 months) posted on Glassdoor Calgary — estimated CA$102K–$123K
Senior QA Analyst (Disruption Management Solutions) also actively hiring, indicating team growth
Senior DevOps role open in Calgary
Scrum certification listed as asset — signals Agile-mature team
In-person collaboration up to 5 days/week required — Calgary campus-centric
company.internRelevance: WestJet does not prominently advertise a formal intern program, but actively posts intermediate/term Product Owner roles in Calgary that are well-suited for students or recent grads with Agile, backlog management, and API/technical fluency. The Disruption Management and Flight Crew Ops product teams offer direct exposure to mission-critical airline technology at scale.
